slides.title: A reason to get up may *add years*.
slides.sub: A sense of purpose is quietly tied to living longer. It can be small, and it pulls the other habits along.

slides.title: Purpose tracks longevity
slides.body: A sense of purpose, what some call ikigai, is *linked to living longer*. People with one tend to age better.

slides.title: It lowers the load
slides.body: Purpose *lowers stress and motivates* healthy habits. With a reason to keep going, the daily basics feel easier to hold.

slides.title: It can be small
slides.body: Purpose can be *a hobby or a project*, or simply helping others. It does not need to be a grand mission.

slides.title: Stay useful and needed
slides.body: In Blue Zones, elders *stay useful and needed* well into old age. A role in the day keeps them engaged.

slides.title: It anchors the rest
slides.body: Purpose gives the other habits *something to serve*. Sleep, food and movement matter more when they support a life you want.

slides.title: Give your habits *something to serve*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, water and steps into one daily plan, so the basics stay easy to keep up.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:

It lowers stress and motivates healthy habits, and it can be small: a hobby, a project, helping others. In Blue Zones, elders stay useful and needed. Save this. 🔖
